title: urochloa ruziziensis
intro: Urochloa ruziziensis, also known as Ruzi grass, is a species of grass native to Africa. It is widely used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Urochloa ruziziensis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Urochloa ruziziensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Africa.
